problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: If Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
